titleZh: 北京市优化营商环境条例（2024年修订）
titleEn: Regulations of Beijing Municipality on Optimizing Business Environment (2024 Revision)
shortTitle: 北京市优化营商环境条例
issuingBodyZh: 北京市人民代表大会常务委员会
issuingBodyEn: Standing Committee of the Beijing Municipal People's Congress
summaryZh: 北京市综合性营商环境地方性法规的现行文本。2024年修订后继续以市场环境、政务服务、监管执法和法治保障为主轴，并保留一址多照、住所标准化登记、自贸试验区商事主体登记确认制等公司登记便利化条款。
summaryEn: The current comprehensive Beijing local regulation on business environment. After the 2024 revision, it continues to structure the subject around market environment, government services, regulatory enforcement, and legal safeguards, while retaining company-registration facilitation rules on shared addresses, standardized domicile registration, and registration-confirmation reform in the Beijing free trade zone.

sources.label: Official English (reference)
sources.noteZh: 北京市司法局发布的多语种译本 PDF，可用于英文对照；解释与适用仍以中文法定文本为准。
sources.noteEn: Multilingual PDF issued by the Beijing Municipal Bureau of Justice for English comparison; the Chinese statutory text remains controlling.
